Our Benefits

Discover Spottix Benefits

Report issues, track resolution progress and help improve your neighbourhood.

✍️

Quick Civic Reporting

Report garbage piles, broken lights, or sewage leaks in seconds with geotagged photo proof.

⏱️

Live Resolution Tracking

Follow real-time status updates directly from ward officials from reporting to successful resolution.

Smart Location Detection

A robust set of civic tools built to bridge the gap between citizens and local ward officers.

Simple Steps, Big Impact

Change in 4 Simple Steps

How Spottix turns citizen observations into local ward-level action.

1
📸

Spot an Issue

Spot garbage piles, overflowing sewage, potholes, water leaks or broken streetlights.

2
🏷️

Snap & Tag

Take a photo. Spottix automatically captures the accurate GPS location and category.

Photo Auto Location
3
⏱️

Track Status

Watch the status change live: New, Active, In Progress, Resolved.

NEW ↓ IN PROGRESS
4
🔔

Get Notified

Receive an instant notification when the ward officer uploads verification proof.

Live. Local. Impactful.

Platform Power

Spottix Advanced Capabilities

Explore the tools built to help Bengaluru citizens verify and track issues faster.

📸
Instant Issue Reporting Geotagged photographic records uploaded directly to BBMP ward portal.
🔍
Smart Category Detection Intelligent categories auto-sorting based on reporting details.
👥
Community Verification Citizens upvote and verify local reports to build public ward records.
🗺️
Ward-Level Tracking Detailed metrics highlighting local resolution performance ratings.
🛡️ Secure User Data
⚡ Real-Time Updates
✅ 99.9% Uptime
📋 Verified Reports

Feedback

What Bengaluru Says About Spottix

“

"Spottix has made civic reporting incredibly easy. I reported a pothole near my house and it was fixed within 3 days. The live tracking feature is brilliant!"

MR
Meera Reddy Citizen Koramangala, Bengaluru
“

"As a community volunteer, Spottix helps me stay connected with my neighbourhood. The gamification keeps me motivated to contribute more!"

AD
Aditya Das Volunteer Indiranagar, Bengaluru
“

"Spottix bridges the gap between citizens and ward officers. The geotagged reports with photos make verification quick and efficient."

SK
Suresh Kumar Ward Officer Ward 186, Bengaluru
“

"I love how I can see the status of my report. The app is easy to use and I feel heard. Spottix is making our city a better place to live."

SI
Sneha Iyer Citizen Jayanagar, Bengaluru

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes, Spottix is completely free for all citizens. Download the app and start reporting civic issues immediately without any subscription fees.
You can report issues with your verified profile to help build accountability. However, your personal details remain private and are only visible to ward officers.
Spottix is currently live in Bengaluru with coverage across all 198 wards. We are actively working to expand to other major Indian cities soon.
Location data is only used to accurately tag your civic issue reports and help ward officers identify the exact location. We do not track your movements or share location data with third parties.
Resolution time varies by issue type and ward. On average, 95% of reported issues are resolved within 2-5 days. You can track live status updates in the app.
Spottix
